failed_attempts:
intro N
  have h₁ : ∃ n ≥ N, ∃ p : ℕ, Nat.Prime p ∧ p ∣ n ^ 2 + 1 ∧ (p : ℝ) > 2 * n + √(2 * n) := by
    use 2 * N + 1
    constructor
    · linarith
    · have h₂ : (2 * N + 1 : ℕ) ^ 2 + 1 > 0 := by positivity
      have h₃ : ∃ p : ℕ, Nat.Prime p ∧ p ∣ (2 * N + 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by
        apply Nat.exists_prime_and_dvd
        exact h₂
      obtain ⟨p, hp₁, hp₂⟩ := h₃
      use p
      constructor
      · exact hp₁
      constructor
      · exact hp₂
      · have h₄ : (p : ℝ) ≥ ((2 * N + 1) ^ 2 + 1 : ℝ) / ((2 * N + 1) ^ 2 + 1 : ℝ) := by
          norm_cast
          apply Nat.le_of_dvd
          · exact h₂
          · exact hp₂
        have h₅ : (p : ℝ) > 2 * (2 * N + 1) + √(2 * (2 * N + 1)) := by
          have h₆ : (p : ℝ) ≥ ((2 * N + 1) ^ 2 + 1 : ℝ) := by
            have h₇ : (p : ℕ) ≥ ((2 * N + 1) ^ 2 + 1) / ((2 * N + 1) ^ 2 + 1) := by
              apply Nat.le_of_dvd
              · exact h₂
              · exact hp₂
            norm_cast at h₇ ⊢
            nlinarith
          have h₇ : ((2 * N + 1) ^ 2 + 1 : ℝ) > 2 * (2 * N + 1) + √(2 * (2 * N + 1)) := by
            nlinarith [Real.sqrt_nonneg (2 * (2 * N + 1)), sq_sqrt (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ 2 * (2 * N + 1) by positivity)]
          linarith
        exact h₅
  exact h₁

intro N

      constructor

          norm_cast
          nlinarith [Nat.Prime.two_le hp₁]
        have h₅ : √((2 * N + 1 : ℕ) ^ 2 + 1) > 2 * (2 * N + 1) + √(2 * (2 * N + 1)) := by

        linarith
  exact h₁

intro N
  have h₁ : ∃ n ≥ N, ∃ p, Nat.Prime p ∧ p ∣ n ^ 2 + 1 ∧ (p : ℝ) > 2 * n + √(2 * n) := by
    let n := 2 * N ^ 2
    use n
    constructor
    · nlinarith
    · have h₂ : n ^ 2 + 1 > 1 := by
        nlinarith
      obtain ⟨p, hp, hpd⟩ := Nat.exists_prime_and_dvd h₂
      use p
      constructor
      · exact hp
      · constructor
        · exact hpd
        · have h₃ : (p : ℝ) ≥ √(n ^ 2 + 1) := by
            apply le_sqrt_of_sq_le
            norm_cast
            nlinarith [Nat.Prime.one_lt hp]
          have h₄ : √(n ^ 2 + 1) > 2 * n + √(2 * n) := by
            apply lt_sqrt_of_sq_lt
            nlinarith [sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ (2 * n : ℝ) from by positivity)]
          linarith
  exact h₁

  have h₁ : ∃ n ≥ N, ∃ p, Nat.Prime p ∧ p ∣ n ^ 2 + 1 ∧ (p : ℝ) > 2 * n + √(2 * n) := by
    let n := 2 * N * N
    use n
    constructor
    · nlinarith
    · have h₂ : n ^ 2 + 1 > 1 := by
        nlinarith
      obtain ⟨p, hp, hpd⟩ := Nat.exists_prime_and_dvd h₂
      use p
      constructor
      · exact hp
      constructor
      · exact hpd
      · have h₃ : (p : ℝ) ≥ √(n ^ 2 + 1) := by
          apply le_sqrt_of_sq_le
          norm_cast
          nlinarith [Nat.Prime.pos hp]
        have h₄ : √(n ^ 2 + 1) > 2 * n + √(2 * n) := by
          apply lt_sqrt_of_sq_lt
          nlinarith [sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ (2 * n : ℝ) by positivity)]
        linarith
  exact h₁

intro N
  have h₁ : ∃ n ≥ N, ∃ p : ℕ, Nat.Prime p ∧ p ∣ n ^ 2 + 1 ∧ (p : ℝ) > 2 * n + √(2 * n) := by
    use 2 * N + 1
    constructor
    · linarith
    · have h₂ : (2 * N + 1 : ℕ) ^ 2 + 1 > 0 := by positivity
      have h₃ : ∃ p : ℕ, Nat.Prime p ∧ p ∣ (2 * N + 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by
        apply Nat.exists_prime_and_dvd
        exact h₂
      obtain ⟨p, hp₁, hp₂⟩ := h₃
      use p
      constructor
      · exact hp₁
      · constructor
        · exact hp₂
        · have h₄ : (p : ℝ) ≥ ((2 * N + 1) ^ 2 + 1 : ℝ) / ((2 * N + 1) ^ 2 + 1 : ℝ) := by
            norm_cast
            exact Nat.cast_le.mpr (Nat.le_of_dvd (by positivity) hp₂)
          have h₅ : ((2 * N + 1) ^ 2 + 1 : ℝ) > (2 * (2 * N + 1) + Real.sqrt (2 * (2 * N + 1))) ^ 2 := by
            nlinarith [Real.sqrt_nonneg (2 * (2 * N + 1)), sq_sqrt (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ 2 * (2 * N + 1) by positivity)]
          nlinarith [Real.sqrt_nonneg (2 * (2 * N + 1)), sq_sqrt (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ 2 * (2 * N + 1) by positivity)]
  exact h₁

intro N
  have h₁ : ∃ n ≥ N, ∃ p, Nat.Prime p ∧ p ∣ n ^ 2 + 1 ∧ (p : ℝ) > 2 * n + √(2 * n) := by
    let n := N + 1
    have hn : n ≥ N := by linarith
    have h₂ : ∃ p, Nat.Prime p ∧ p ∣ n ^ 2 + 1 := by
      apply exists_prime_and_dvd
      exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by nlinarith)
    obtain ⟨p, hp₁, hp₂⟩ := h₂
    use n, hn, p, hp₁, hp₂
    have h₃ : (p : ℝ) > 2 * n + √(2 * n) := by
      have h₄ : p ≥ n ^ 2 + 1 := by
        nlinarith [Nat.le_of_dvd (by nlinarith : 0 < n ^ 2 + 1) hp₂]
      have h₅ : (n ^ 2 + 1 : ℝ) > 2 * n + √(2 * n) := by
        have h₆ : 0 ≤ √(2 * n) := by positivity
        nlinarith [sq_sqrt (by positivity : (0 : ℝ) ≤ 2 * n),
          sq_nonneg (n - 1), sq_nonneg (√(2 * n) - 1)]
      linarith
    exact h₃
  exact h₁

intro N
  have h₁ : ∃ n ≥ N, ∃ p, Nat.Prime p ∧ p ∣ n ^ 2 + 1 ∧ (p : ℝ) > 2 * n + √(2 * n) := by
    let n := 2 * N ^ 2
    use n
    constructor
    · nlinarith
    · have hn : n = 2 * N ^ 2 := rfl
      have h₂ : n ^ 2 + 1 > 0 := by positivity
      obtain ⟨p, hp, hpd⟩ := Nat.exists_prime_and_dvd (by positivity : n ^ 2 + 1 > 0)
      use p
      constructor
      · exact hp
      constructor
      · exact hpd
      · have h₃ : (p : ℝ) ≥ √(n ^ 2 + 1) := by
          apply le_sqrt_of_sq_le
          norm_cast
          nlinarith [Nat.Prime.one_lt hp]
        have h₄ : √(n ^ 2 + 1) > 2 * n + √(2 * n) := by
          apply lt_sqrt_of_sq_lt
          nlinarith [sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ (2 * n : ℝ) from by positivity),
            sq_nonneg (√(2 * n) - 1)]
        linarith
  exact h₁

intro N
  have h₁ : ∃ n ≥ N, ∃ p, Nat.Prime p ∧ p ∣ n ^ 2 + 1 ∧ (p : ℝ) > 2 * n + √(2 * n) := by
    let n := max N 1
    have hn : n ≥ N := by
      apply le_max_left
    have h₂ : ∃ p, Nat.Prime p ∧ p ∣ n ^ 2 + 1 ∧ (p : ℝ) > 2 * n + √(2 * n) := by
      have h₃ : n ^ 2 + 1 > 1 := by
        have h₄ : n ≥ 1 := by
          apply le_trans (by norm_num) hn
        nlinarith
      obtain ⟨p, hp₁, hp₂⟩ := Nat.exists_prime_and_dvd h₃
      use p
      constructor
      · exact hp₁
      constructor
      · exact hp₂
      · have h₅ : (p : ℝ) ≥ (n ^ 2 + 1 : ℝ) / (n ^ 2 + 1 : ℝ) := by
          norm_num
        have h₆ : (n ^ 2 + 1 : ℝ) > 2 * n + √(2 * n) := by
          have h₇ : 0 < (n : ℝ) := by
            have h₈ : n ≥ 1 := by
              apply le_trans (by norm_num) hn
            exact mod_cast h₈
          have h₉ : 0 < √(2 * n) := by
            exact Real.sqrt_pos.mpr (by positivity)
          nlinarith [sq_sqrt (by positivity : (0 : ℝ) ≤ 2 * n),
            mul_self_nonneg (n - 1)]
        calc
          (p : ℝ) ≥ (n ^ 2 + 1 : ℝ) / (n ^ 2 + 1 : ℝ) := h₅
          _ = 1 := by field_simp
          _ < (n ^ 2 + 1 : ℝ) := by
            have h₁₀ : (n ^ 2 + 1 : ℝ) > 1 := by
              have h₁₁ : n ≥ 1 := by
                apply le_trans (by norm_num) hn
              nlinarith
            linarith
          _ > 2 * n + √(2 * n) := h₆
    exact ⟨n, hn, h₂⟩
  exact h₁

intro N
  have h₁ : ∃ n ≥ N, ∃ p, Nat.Prime p ∧ p ∣ n ^ 2 + 1 ∧ (p : ℝ) > 2 * n + √(2 * n) := by

        exact h₂

      · exact hp₂

          norm_cast
          apply Nat.cast_le_of_le
          apply Nat.le_of_dvd
          · positivity
          · exact hp₂
        have h₅ : ((2 * N + 1) ^ 2 + 1 : ℝ) > (2 * (2 * N + 1) + Real.sqrt (2 * (2 * N + 1))) ^ 2 := by
          nlinarith [Real.sqrt_nonneg (2 * (2 * N + 1)), sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ (2 * (2 * N + 1) : ℝ) by positivity)]
        nlinarith [h₅]
  exact h₁

intro N
  use 2 * N ^ 2
  constructor
  · nlinarith
  · have h₀ : (2 * N ^ 2 : ℕ) ^ 2 + 1 > 0 := by positivity
    obtain ⟨p, hp₁, hp₂⟩ := Nat.exists_prime_and_dvd ((2 * N ^ 2 : ℕ) ^ 2 + 1)
    use p
    constructor
    · exact hp₁
    constructor
    · exact hp₂
    · have h₁ : (p : ℝ) ≥ ↑((2 * N ^ 2 : ℕ) ^ 2 + 1) / ↑((2 * N ^ 2 : ℕ) ^ 2 + 1).minFac := by
        exact_mod_cast Nat.le_of_dvd (by positivity) hp₂
      have h₂ : ↑((2 * N ^ 2 : ℕ) ^ 2 + 1).minFac ≤ ↑((2 * N ^ 2 : ℕ) ^ 2 + 1) := by
        exact_mod_cast Nat.minFac_le (by positivity)
      have h₃ : (p : ℝ) > 2 * (2 * N ^ 2 : ℝ) + Real.sqrt (2 * (2 * N ^ 2 : ℝ)) := by
        apply lt_of_sub_pos
        field_simp
        nlinarith [sq_sqrt (by positivity : (0 : ℝ) ≤ 2 * (2 * N ^ 2)),
          Real.sqrt_nonneg (2 * (2 * N ^ 2))]
      exact h₃
